zh.lifeSummary: Margaret de Everingham於1292年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什。她於1310年與John Standish在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret de Everingham was born in 1292, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Standish in 1310, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1334, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret d’Everingham est née en 1292, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John Standish en 1310, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1334, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret de Everingham wurde 1292 in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1310 in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom John Standish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1334 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret de Everingham è nata il nel 1292 nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato John Standish nel 1310, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1334, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Everinghamは1292年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた。1310年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュでJohn Standishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Everingham(은)는 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 John Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.
